items.caption: A close-up of a health insurance claim form with a pen resting on it, ready to fill out the form. the form includes fields for personal information such as name, date of birth, and relationship to the insured, as well as details about the insurance policy, including the policy number and the name of the insurance company. the form is typically used to initiate a claim for health insurance benefits.

A close-up of a document titled "health insurance claim form" with a pen resting on top of it. the document appears to be a standard insurance claim form with fields for personal information, details of the claim, and possibly medical records. the form is partially obscured by other documents and a graph or chart in the background, suggesting a busy office or administrative setting. the focus is on the pen and the form, indicating a theme of health insurance and the process of filing a claim.
Two women examining home insurance policy form, focused on details.
items.creator: Mikhail Nilov

items.caption: Close-up of a hand signing insurance documents in an office setting.
